scope: Repository-steward remediation of navigation, freshness, duplicate-truth, default-search, validation, and archive/source-input hygiene. No OFARM semantic law changed.

phaseRecords.note: MATERIAL_STATUS records now expose activeLaw/artifactRole/searchDefault overlays; README/folder.status are metadata, not law.
All folder.status.json files now carry canonical camelCase fields plus metadataArtifactActiveLaw:false while preserving compatibility keys.
Historical, spike, and draft implementation folders are excluded in IMPLEMENTATION_SUBFOLDER_INDEX and default search profile.
generate_indexes.yml renamed to validate_generated_currentness.yml and workflows run the full steward guardrail step.
Root delta/changelog rewritten as current-first chronological repository-steward summaries.
Final validation summaries are refreshed from the current cross-reference scan after this patch.
PATH_REMAPS.json now separates sourcePackage from currentPackage and marks applicability to the current package.
Validator documentation now points to a complete validation suite and wrapper command.
Handover, AGENTS, llms, and README now reference the full validation suite.
README reserves latest/current language for the current steward remediation and marks phases 12-15 as history.
Non-active copies are indexed, search-excluded, and governed by quarantine policy; physical renames are deferred to avoid breaking paths.
TRACEABILITY_INDEX.json remains canonical; generated traceability is derived; Markdown regenerated as path table.
Generated duplicates are explicitly marked by policy as derived from canonical active/root indexes.
Review-holding snapshots remain preserved but are explicitly search-excluded; physical archival is deferred to a future release cut.
Implementation subfolder index now carries recommended lanes for examples, conformance, promotion evidence, historical archive, spikes, and pilots.
Accepted RFC README now groups RFCs, closure notes, matrices, and other accepted governance records.
DECISION_INDEX.md regenerated from DECISION_INDEX.json with human-readable decision tables.
TRACEABILITY_INDEX.md regenerated from JSON with concept-to-authority/RFC/schema/example columns.
CURRENT_SOURCE_INPUTS.md added and research/source-input README updated for current vs lineage source input navigation.
check_repository_steward_guardrails.py added and included in validation suite/workflows.

supersessionNote: Batch 1 was metadata/search-quarantine remediation. Batch 2 completed the physical structural work and Batch 2.1 updated currentness pointers. Do not cite Batch 1 as the current completion state.

statusAfterBatch2AndBatch21.phase2: Batch 2 removed legacy folder-status compatibility keys.
statusAfterBatch2AndBatch21.phase11: Batch 2 physically renamed/archived same-basename schema copies; visible active-schema same-basename copies outside active schemas are zero.
statusAfterBatch2AndBatch21.phase14: Batch 2 physically archived root reviewed_* snapshots under archive/review_holding/.
statusAfterBatch2AndBatch21.phase15: Batch 2 physically split 04_implementation_and_conformance/ into controlled lane folders.
statusAfterBatch2AndBatch21.currentness: Batch 2.1 makes Batch 2/2.1 the visible current repository-steward control surface.
